items.statement: Verify identity-defining anatomy against the active character profile.

evidence.quote: 注意老三无尾或短尾的特征

items.rationale: The anatomy check generalizes while the concrete fact remains in Profile.

items.statement: Load current WeChat sticker export requirements before validation.

evidence.quote: 按照表情包规则形成最终稿

items.rationale: The requirement is caused by the target platform.

items.statement: Laosan has no visible tail or only a very short tail.

evidence.quote: 注意老三无尾或短尾的特征

items.rationale: This is a stable identity fact for one named character.

items.statement: Produce eight stickers in this run.

evidence.quote: 现在我们来做第二套（8个）

items.rationale: The count can change without changing the workflow.

items.statement: Transparent exports can develop a visible white edge halo.
items.rationale: The defect becomes a reusable transparent-edge validation lesson.
items.abstracted_rule: Preview transparent exports on light and dark backgrounds before packaging.

items.statement: A named character's anatomy must not become a breed-wide rule.

evidence.locator: conversation: correction of over-generalized tail rule

items.rationale: This prevents a profile fact from contaminating reusable workflow logic.
items.abstracted_rule: Keep named-entity identity facts in Profile and reference them through a generic identity check.

items.statement: Preparing submission assets does not authorize publishing or submitting them.

evidence.quote: 只准备投稿物料，没有授权发布

items.rationale: Submission is an external account action requiring fresh authorization.

questions.prompt: Keep the tail fact only in the Laosan Profile and preserve the anti-generalization lesson?
questions.recommended_answer: Yes — keep the concrete fact out of Core and retain the generic scope rule.

questions.prompt: Require fresh authorization before actual submission or publishing?
questions.recommended_answer: Yes — generation and preparation do not authorize an external action.

confirmations.answer: 确认，只属于老三，并保留不可泛化的教训。
确认，实际提交或发布前必须重新授权。
